hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git[[:space:]]+stash'; then printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"git stash is banned in this repo. WHY: multiple Claude agents often work in this repo in parallel, and unexpected uncommitted changes in the working tree are likely another agent\u0027s in-flight work. Stashing (or reverting/discarding) silently hides that work and has caused lost changes in the past. WHAT TO DO INSTEAD: stop, describe the conflicting files to the user, and wait for them to confirm it is safe to continue. See CLAUDE.md \u2192 Collaboration rules and the feedback_no_stash memory."}}'; fi
